jsonLd.title: Safexpress is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Safexpress family as a Warehouse Manager in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Safexpress:
Safexpress is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Safexpress!
